executives.name: Abby Khandelwal
executives.background: Mr. Khandelwal joined B2Gold in 2024 as Chief Financial Officer. He previously served as CFO of Pretium Resources Inc.

executives.name: Alison White
executives.background: Ms. White was appointed Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer in 2021. She has over 25 years of experience in finance and accounting, including roles at Newmont Corporation and ConocoPhillips.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Ken Konkin
executives.background: Mr. Konkin is a Professional Geologist with over 35 years of experience in exploration and mining. He was instrumental in the discovery of the Valley of the Kings deposit at Pretium Resources Inc. and has worked extensively in the Golden Triangle of British Columbia.

executives.name: Paul Benson
executives.background: Mr. Benson was appointed as Chairman in 2021. He has over 30 years of experience in the mining sector, including as CEO of SSR Mining and CEO of Troy Resources.

executives.name: Ed Farid
executives.background: Mr. Farid was appointed Executive Vice President and Chief Corporate Development Officer in 2020. He previously served as Senior Vice President, Business Development and Strategy at Alacer Gold.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Corporate Development Officer & Executive Vice President

executives.name: Kevin O'Kane
executives.background: Mr. O'Kane is a mining executive with over 35 years of experience, including senior roles at BHP Billiton and SSR Mining.

executives.name: Michael Anglin
executives.background: Lead Independent Director. Former executive at BHP Billiton with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.

executives.name: Michael Sparks
executives.background: Mr. Sparks was appointed Executive Vice President, Chief Legal and Administrative Officer and Secretary in 2020. He previously served as Chief Legal Officer at Alacer Gold.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer, Secretary

executives.name: Rodney Antal
executives.background: Mr. Antal was appointed Executive Chairman of SSR Mining in 2024. He previously served as President, Chief Executive Officer and Director since 2020. Prior to the merger with Alacer Gold, he was President and CEO of Alacer Gold since 2013. He has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.

tenure_dates.title: President and Chief Executive Officer / Director

executives.name: Simon Fish
executives.background: Independent Director. Former General Counsel of BMO Financial Group and Vale S.A.

board_of_directors.name: Brian Booth
board_of_directors.background: Independent Director. Former President and CEO of Element 29 Resources Inc. and Pembrook Copper Corp.

board_of_directors.name: Michael Anglin
board_of_directors.background: Lead Independent Director. Former executive at BHP Billiton with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.

board_of_directors.name: Rodney Antal
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Antal was appointed Executive Chairman of SSR Mining in 2024. He previously served as President, Chief Executive Officer and Director since 2020. Prior to the merger with Alacer Gold, he was President and CEO of Alacer Gold since 2013. He has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.
